title: BenchmarkProfileSchema
description: Schema for LLM benchmark model execution profile configuration.

profile_id.description: Unique identifier for the benchmark profile.

description.description: Human-readable description of this benchmark profile.

model_id.description: Identifier of the model to use in this profile.

min_prompt_tokens.description: Minimum prompt token count for generated requests.

max_prompt_tokens.description: Maximum prompt token count for generated requests.

min_completion_tokens.description: Minimum completion token count for generated responses.

max_completion_tokens.description: Maximum completion token count for generated responses.

concurrent_requests.description: Number of concurrent virtual users / request streams.

total_requests.description: Total number of requests to execute in the run.

time_per_token_ms.description: Generation time per token in milliseconds.
